name: @vibe-engineer-starter/golden-api-fixture
description: I-16A golden-api fixture: a NestJS-style `ts-rest` provider that validates request+response against the canonical golden-records contract BEFORE application logic (fail-closed), a consumer flow that calls the generated client and re-parses the response, the real-boundary witness (5 booleans), and the runtime dep-resolver hook + witness runner. Domain-neutral sample/demo/reference (DL-14 / DL-16 / DL-20A). Mirrors the proven I-11 reference-flow pattern.

vibeEngineer.consumptionModel: consumes contract-derived client/types only (no duplicated contract source)
vibeEngineer.boundaryRule: provider validates request then response against the canonical contract (fail-closed, DL-14 §3); consumer/client never duplicate contract schemas (DL-14 §5)

//dependency-model: Graph-neutral: this fixture path is NOT a pnpm workspace member (pnpm-workspace.yaml = packages/*, packages/presets/*, packages/adapters/*, infra/pulumi), so the modeled runtime deps below add ZERO edges to the real harness workspace graph and require no lockfile reconciliation. The REAL resolve+runtime of @ts-rest/core + zod is exercised by the witness runner via an ESM resolve loader hook (src/runtime/dep-resolver-hooks.mjs) anchored at the harness packages/contracts context (the validated I-15B-3 in-context resolution precedent) — NO install, NO manifest/lockfile edit, NO mock.
